content.situation: 对方无法打开你发送的PPT文件，建议改用PDF格式以便兼容所有设备。
content.speakerText: I can't open the PPT file on my phone—it just crashes. Could you send it as a PDF instead?
content.speakerTextCn: 我在手机上打不开PPT文件，总是崩溃。你能改发PDF吗？
content.responseTemplate: I'll ___ it as a PDF and send it over right away.
content.hint: 表示‘转换格式’时，最准确的动词是哪个？

content.situation: 你发送的压缩包太大，对方建议改用云盘分享，你同意并说明权限设置。
content.speakerText: The ZIP file is too large—could you upload it to Dropbox and share the link?
content.speakerTextCn: ZIP文件太大了，你能上传到Dropbox然后分享链接吗？
content.responseTemplate: Sure, I'll upload it to Dropbox and set the link to ___.

blanks.answer: Anyone with the link can view
options: Anyone with the link can view

content.hint: 为确保对方能顺利打开，你应该设置什么权限？
content.knowledgePoint: 云盘分享权限的标准表达

content.situation: 对方收到的文档格式不兼容，你提议改用Word文档，同时主动提出检查是否能正常打开。
content.speakerText: I can't edit this .docx file—it’s locked. Do you have it in .rtf?
content.speakerTextCn: 我无法编辑这个.docx文件，它是锁定的。你有RTF格式的吗？
content.responseTemplate: I'll resend it as an RTF file and ___ it works for you.
content.hint: 在提供替代方案后，为了减少后续沟通，你应该用哪个词表达‘确认是否有效’？
content.knowledgePoint: 主动确认解决方案有效性的表达
